s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR CONDITIONING PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and remove the air conditioning panel sub-assembly.
Disengage the 4 claws and remove the ornament.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CONTROL KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

atten3.ptxt: When disassembling the air conditioning control assembly, eliminate static electricity by touching the vehicle body to prevent the components from being damaged.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and remove the control panel case.
Remove the 5 screws and switch control sub-assembly.

s3.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and pull the control knob sub-assembly to the position shown in the illustration.
Disengage the 3 claws and remove the control knob sub-assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Remove the control knob sub-assembly and the dual push switch as a unit.

s3.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and remove the control knob sub-assembly.
